description_long: This is an adult pedestrian dressed in a coordinated athletic tracksuit with a cropped jacket and matching pants, both featuring bold side stripes with the word 'FREEFIRE' printed along the length. The jacket is partially unzipped, revealing a midriff, and the pants are fitted with elastic cuffs at the ankles. The individual is wearing low-top sneakers with visible laces, suitable for urban or casual environments. The figure's posture is dynamic, with one arm bent and the other extended, suggesting movement or readiness. The hairstyle is short and neatly styled, complementing the sporty and modern appearance. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult in a sporty tracksuit with side stripes and sneakers, posed in a dynamic, ready stance with short, neat hair. The outfit is coordinated and modern, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cropped jacket, midriff, and full frontal details of the tracksuit and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'FREEFIRE' stripe on the jacket and pants, and the dynamic arm posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket and pants, as well as the elastic cuffs and heel details of the sneakers.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the side stripe, sneaker profile, and the figure's bent arm and forward-leaning posture.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic tracksuit with cropped jacket and fitted pants featuring side stripes
attribute_posture: dynamic, slightly crouched stance with one arm bent and the other extended
